calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner in propria persona

Mr. Steiner stated that one bank account was discovered in late 2017, assets were searched in 2009, that the decedent who inherited money late in life moved funds in different bank accounts for purposes of insurance and to avoid interest taxes, and this account was not on the list of bank accounts provided to him. The Second and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc., is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
